titleStmt.title: SII 28.34: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 34. (A.R. No. 34 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, east base of the maṇḍapa in front of

In late characters (14-15th century), this record, whose later portion is lost, records a resolution of the Valaṅgai-98 and Iḍaṅgai-98 of Vaḷudalampaṭṭu-usāvaḍi having assembled in the tirukkaṭṭaḷai of the temple of Kuṟṟam-poṟuttaruḷiya-nāyinār of Kuraṅgāḍutuṟai in Viṭṭapaṟṟu-Ugaḷūrkūṟṟam in Poṉparappi-śūḻnda-padineṭṭupaṟṟu in Iruṅgōḷappāḍip Paṇḍīyavaḷanāḍu in Mēṟkānāḍu in Virudarāja-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu on the northern bank of the Kāvēri, to meet again and again to hear complaints (from the members of their groups) of harrassment from Uśāvaḍi-ppiṟādhāni, vaṉṉiyar and jivitakārar as also from the birāmaṇar and veḷḷāḷar, the holders of kāṇi and such persons, with the collusion of royal officicals (irāja-karttār). Apparently the valaṅgai-98 and iḍaṅgai-98 would arrange for relief to the members of their group from such harassment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . ṣavumiya varuṣam cittirai mātam 10 6 nāḷ kāveri vaṭakarai virutarāca payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkā
nāṭṭu Iruṅkoḷappāṭip pāṇṭiyavaḷanāṭṭup poṉparappi cūḻnta patiṉeṭṭup paṟṟil viṭṭapaṟṟu
Ukaḷḷūṟ kūṟṟattu Ukaḷḷūṟpaṟṟu kuraṅkāṭiyatuṟai Uṭaiyār kuṟṟam poṟuttaruḷiya nāyiṉār
koyilil tirukkaṭṭaḷaiyil vaḻutalampaṭṭu Ucāvaṭiyil valaṅkai toṇṇūṟṟeṭṭum Iṭaṅ
kai toṇṇūṟṟeṭṭum niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu kalveṭṭiṉapaṭi Inta maṇṭala
ttil Ucāvaṭip piṟatāṉi vaṉṉiyar civitakāṟar ṉeṭukkam paṇṇiṉālum kāṇiyāḷarāṉa pirāmaṇar
veḷḷāḻar Ippaṭikkotta maṉittar Irācakarattāraik koṇṭu namakku Oru tāḻvu niṉaittālum nammilo
rkku Iṭaṅkuṭukkutal koṭcollukutal cannācar paṭṭaiyattai koviṉātaṉ kālāl Irupattunālu AṭiA detached piece which seems to be a continuation of lines 8 and 9 reads i) yum vālak ii) vum intam
kuṭiyaiyum Aḻittāl Ivaṉaiyvarum yiṉṟupola kūṭi Iruntu keṭṭukkoḷḷak kaṭavomāka
ṇṭalattukkuḷḷe yātoruttar nāṭṭut turokam paṇṇukutal kāriyam ceyttal kaṇakku Eḻutu(ku)tal �Continuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 28.34 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
